ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_ascii" TEXT /* ASCII representation of the city name */,
  "province_id" TEXT /* ID of the province the city belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timezone the city belongs to */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city ranking */,
  "postal_codes" TEXT /* List of postal codes associated with the city */,
  "city_area" TEXT /* Area of the city */,
  "city_mayor" TEXT /* Name of the city mayor */,
  "city電話hone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_ranking_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranking_id") REFERENCES city_rankings ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_timezone_id FOREIGN KEY ("timezone_id") REFERENCES timezone_offsets ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the province */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the population */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language spoken by the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "city_area" TEXT /* Area or neighborhood within the city for the postal code */,
  "postal_code_type" TEXT /* Type of the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezone_offsets" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timezone entry */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the timezone */,
  "offset" TEXT /* UTC offset for the timezone */,
  "dst_offset" TEXT /* Daylight Saving Time (DST) offset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being ranked */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for ranking (e.g., population, area) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on the criteria */,
  "ranking_year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_rankings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the service is available */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., public transportation, health services) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility (e.g., library, community center) */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility */,
  "facility_address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_facilities_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the upload */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the data version */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
